hook.name: Clanker Dynamic Fee Hook (V2)
hook.description: A dynamic fee hook for Clanker pools that adjusts LP fees based on realized volatility. It simulates each swap to estimate the post-swap tick, computes a volatility accumulator from tick displacement relative to a reference tick, and calls updateDynamicLPFee with a fee that scales quadratically with volatility, bounded by configurable base and max fee parameters.
